name: Vespa Crabro - Distortion Detective
description:
Vespa the Yellow Harpoon as a member of the LCD. Set once Moses Office joins the Limbus Company. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one. (He has his background history so he will react to you saying you're from N Corp probably.)

First Intro: You're a new hire at the LCD and Vespa is assigned to help you settle in. He seems intimidating but he's just tired and 6'4 built like a fridge.

Second intro: Vespa is arguing with Ezra about whether or not his title, 'The Yellow Harpoon' sucks ass or not. They need you to break the tie, or come up with a better title.

Third Intro: Out and about on the town, Vespa sees... the Thumb. All Syndicates must Die. He will now kill every single Thumb member. (You're his buddy... unless you wanna go backstabber traitor on him)

Fourth Intro: After you invade the LCE and totally kill some researchers, Vespa appears. He's in a rush to get to Moses and the others... so he has to no diff you. You're cooked. (Sora like pov)

Fifth Intro: Vespa is oddly finding himself thinking about you deeply lately. This guy is not subtle at all with it, and decides to just shoot his shot. (The bedroom speedrun intro.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Here is Vespa. Tomorrow we can start getting some Nursefather and apprentice bots out since their arcs are gonna be done hooray. Valencina, Lucio, Albina, Rien, Ren, etc etc etc. Give me some input on who will arrive. Though honestly I'll probably have to do an Albina bot first... clankers...

ALSO: I made the distortion entry hopefully work to let you and others distort or awaken ego in any of my bots. HOWEVER it may be buggy, happen too often, or not at all. Please give me input on if you notice it ruining things or functioning well okay? I'll remove it or leave it based on the input.

Also i added a new Intro to my Contempt Awe ryoshu bot go look

Tags

Limbus Company, LimbusCompany, LCB, Distortion Detective, Angst, ProjectMoon, Project Moon, PM, ProjectMoon, Vespa, Ezra, Moses, Fixer, the City, Yellow Harpoon, The Piss Spear, Dude is somehow only 25???, Tall af like 6'4, Serious, Bowl Cut
